name: rec-digital-learning-ecosystem
description: REC Digital Learning Ecosystem - A comprehensive Learning Management System

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.typecheck: cd client && npm run typecheck && cd ../server && npm run typecheck
scripts.clean: rm -rf client/.next client/node_modules server/dist server/node_modules node_modules
